scripts.test:integration: docker build -t @lightscope-ce/proxy-test -f Dockerfile ../../ && docker run -d --name proxy-integration-test -p 3002:3002 -e CLICKHOUSE_URL=http://localhost:8123 -e CLICKHOUSE_USERNAME=lightscope -e CLICKHOUSE_PASSWORD=lightscope -e CLICKHOUSE_DB=lightscope -e PORT=3002 -e ALLOWED_ORIGINS=* -e JWT_SECRET=secret-for-dev-only-do-not-use-in-prod @lightscope-ce/proxy-test && WAIT_PORTS=3002 node ../../utils/wait-for-services.js && vitest run integration ; docker rm -f proxy-integration-test
